channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mystery remains over cause of death of former NFL cornerback Vontae Davis
item.description: The cause of death for former NFL star cornerback Vontae Davis is still undetermined more than a year after he died at a Florida home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baseball Hall of Famer Ken Griffey Jr. relishing chance to photograph Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Ken Griffey Jr.’s wife, Melissa, asked if he could do some chores around the house this weekend. “No,” he told her, “I have to work the Masters.” They haven't spoken in a few days, he said kiddingly.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Domantas Sabonis set to win 3rd straight NBA rebound title, eyeing another All-NBA spot
item.description: Sacramento's Domantas Sabonis is about to join a pretty special group of rebounders. There are six players in NBA history to win at least three consecutive rebound titles: Wilt Chamberlain, Dennis Rodman, Moses Malone, Kevin Garnett and Andre Drummond.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How to watch the WNBA Draft and the Golden State Valkyries’ first pick
item.description: The 2025 WNBA draft takes place on Monday, April 14 at The Shed in New York City, and for the first time ever, the Golden State Valkyries will make a pick.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Chicago Fire face Inter Miami in Eastern Conference action
item.description: Inter Miami CF (4-0-2, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Fire (3-2-2, sixth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 4:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: US star McKennie, Tonali, Fagioli among 13 players being investigated for illegal gambling
item.description: MILAN (AP) — United States midfielder Weston McKennie is among 13 soccer players being investigated for illegal online betting in Italy, according to widespread media reports. A new investigation by Milan prosecutors stems from evidence given by Sandro Tonali and Nicolò Fagioli in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka and the Lakers believe they can win a championship after wrapping up the Pacific title
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers said they believe they can win an NBA championship after they wrapped up the Pacific Division title.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Freddie Freeman returns to Dodgers' lineup after missing 9 games with ankle injury from shower slip
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Los Angeles Dodgers slugger Freddie Freeman came off the injured list Friday after missing nine games with a right ankle injury that resulted from slipping in the shower at home.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Landeskog 'excited about what the future looks like' after playing in a game for 1st time in 3 years
item.description: LOVELAND, Colo. (AP) — For the first time in 1,020 or so days, Gabriel Landeskog has some fresh game tape to examine. Game tape of him hitting players, taking hits, being called for a penalty and even putting someone in a headlock.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Edwards' 18th technical foul means another suspension, this time for Timberwolves' meaningful finale
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Much of this season for the Minnesota Timberwolves has been harder than it needed to be, so it's fitting they might have to play their final game — which they need to win to improve their seed for the playoffs — without star Anthony Edwards.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: With aid of early error, Bellarmine edges St. Ignatius in tight WCAL pitchers’ duel in San Jose
item.description: Bellarmine baseball and St. Ignatius duked it out on Friday in San Jose, and the Bells came out on top thanks to some big at-bats in the second inning. Bellarmine, after an 0-5 start, has now won four WCAL games in a row.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Warriors control play-in destiny after handling Blazers
item.description: Golden State Warriors survive Curry injury scare, can now clinch Top 6 seed with victory over Clippers on Sunday
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Cardinals reserve C Yohel Pozo making the most of his first trip back to the majors since 2021
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Reserve catcher Yohel Pozo will remember his first time being in St. Louis. Pozo came off the bench in the second inning against the Philadelphia Phillies on Friday night after teammate Masyn Winn left after one inning with lower back spasms, sliding into the shortstop's No.
item.dc:creator: WARREN MAYES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Caitlin Clark and the Fever vs. Angel Reese and the Sky will tip off new WNBA Rivals Week in August
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever will face Angel Reese and the Chicago Sky in prime time to tip off the inaugural WNBA Rivals Week in August. Other games will include two between New York and Minnesota in a WNBA Finals rematch; a matchup of projected No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Morant changes 3-point celebration to pretend grenade toss in light of league fines and warnings
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Ja Morant got in trouble again for aiming an imaginary gun to celebrate 3-pointers, so he has gone to a different make-believe violent way to mark a long-distance shot.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC thankful for tremendous fan support
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Although the team was officially eliminated from NHL playoff contention last night, that did not damper the mood before the Utah Hockey Club's final home game of this inaugural season Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU lands point guard Robert Wright III from Baylor
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It didn't take long for Kevin Young to find his new point guard. According to multiple reports, Baylor's Robert Wright III is transferring to BYU for his sophomore season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lonzo Ball meets family of meniscus donor who helped revive his NBA career
item.description: The Reinhardt family donated Alex's organs, which helped save the life of Chicago Bulls guard Lonzo Ball after he underwent cadaver meniscus transplant surgery.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: College athletes and San Diego students with disabilities team up for day of sports
item.description: The Inclusive Sports Foundation has provided children with special needs the opportunity to play sports with college athletes and recently stopped by the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Future uncertain for Duke basketball star due to new Trump administration visa policy
item.description: A new visa policy announced by the Trump administration last weekend could impact South Sudanese passport holders, including Duke basketball phenom Khaman Maluach.
item.dc:creator: Keaton Eberly, WGN 9

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: After Masters week began with a day of rain on Monday, Augusta National Golf Club was bathed in sunshine for Tuesday's practice round.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Steele tosses 7 innings as the Cubs pound the Rangers 7-0 on frigid night
item.description: Justin Steele tossed three-hit ball over seven innings, and the Chicago Cubs beat the Texas Rangers 7-0 on a frigid Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: (KTLA) -- President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4
